LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Assassins.label: Assassin's
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Bloodied.descrip: Does more damage the lower the character's health
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Bloodied.label: Bloodied
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Enraging.descrip: R.A.T.S. hits cause target to frenzy
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Enraging.label: Enraging
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Explosive.label: Explosive
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Incendiary.label: Incendiary
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Instigating.desc: Double damage if the target is full health
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Junkies.descript: Does 15% more damage for each addiction the user has
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Junkies.label: Junkie's
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Kneecapper.descr: 20% chance to cripple all of the target's legs.
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Kneecapper.label: Kneecapper
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Poisoners.descri: Target is poisoned for 10 seconds (3 points poison damage per second).
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Poisoners.label: Poisoner's
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Powerful.label: Powerful
